es.example: En todo caso, te llamo mañana.
es.exampleTranslation: In any case, I'll call you tomorrow.

it.example: In ogni caso, ti chiamo domani.
it.exampleTranslation: In any case, I'll call you tomorrow.

bridge.note: Italian counts cases one by one (ogni), Spanish takes them wholesale (todo) — the same quantifier mirror as con ogni probabilità / con toda probabilidad. Once you see the pattern, both entries teach each other.

interference.es_to_it: The ogni/toda split again (see con ogni probabilità): 'in tutto caso' is not Italian.
interference.it_to_es: 'En cada caso' means literally in each case — the marker is en todo caso.

review.notes: From Joe's Italian teacher's prepositions crash course, 2026-07-16. ES pairing chosen by Claude, unverified — reviewer to confirm.
